The '''Desev system''',<ref name="GatORW" /> also known as the '''Desevro system''',<ref name="Annihilation">''[[The Old Republic: Annihilation]]''</ref> was a [[Binary star/Legends|binary star]] [[Star system/Legends|system]] in the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Desevro/Legends|Desevro]] was located here. It was in the heart of the [[Xim's empire|empire]] created by [[Xim/Legends|Xim]] the Despot.

{{System-stub}}
